title: Programming and DS - Data Structures - Array

questions.question:
To sort many large objects or structures, it would be most efficient to place



Data Structures: NIELIT 2016 MAR Scientist C
options: them in an array and sort the array
pointers to them in an array and sort the array
them in a linked list and sort the linked list
references to them in an array and sort the array
questions.correct_answer: pointers to them in an array and sort the array

questions.question:
Let \( A \) be a square matrix of size \( n\times n \). Consider the following program. What is the expected output?

C=100 
for i=1 to n do 
for j=1 to n do 
{ 
 Temp=A[i][j]+C 
 A[i][j]=A[j][i] 
 A[j][i]=Temp-C 
} 
for i=1 to n do 
for j=1 to n do 
 Output(A[i][j]);


Data Structures: NIELIT 2017 July Scientist B (CS)
options: Adding \( 100 \) to the upper diagonal elements and subtracting \( 100 \) from diagonal elements of \( A \).

questions.question:
Kadane algorithm is used to find



Data Structures: NIELIT 2017 July Scientist B (CS)

A program \( \text{P} \) reads in \( 500 \) integers in the range \( [0\dots100] \) representing the scores of \( 500 \) students. It then prints the frequency of each score above \( 50. \) What would be the best way for \( \text{P} \) to store the frequencies?



Data Structures: NIELIT Scientific Assistant A 2020 November: 109
